name: omniroute-pi-ext-integration
description_en: Pi Coding Agent extension for OmniRoute — view combos, browse providers, and sync models with enriched metadata (context windows, max tokens, reasoning, and vision) to the Ctrl+P picker
description_zh: 用于 OmniRoute 的 Pi Coding Agent 扩展 — 查看组合、浏览提供商，并将具有丰富元数据（上下文窗口、最大 token、推理和视觉）的模型同步到 Ctrl+P 选择器
